clusters.label: Content Inference API
clusters.summary: FastAPI app scores content via TRIBE v2 model, computes NAA + opinion dynamics, generates PDF audit reports.

clusters.label: 3D Brain Renderer
clusters.summary: Three.js-powered visualization system that renders fMRI activation onto high-resolution cortical surfaces with synchronized animation and interactive controls.

clusters.label: TRIBE Neuroscience Engine
clusters.summary: Experiment framework for training neural encoding models on fMRI datasets across multiple neuroimaging studies (Algonauts, BOLD, language stimuli).

clusters.label: Chart Components
clusters.summary: ECharts-based visualization components sharing a common theme and SSR-safe wrapper for rendering diverse chart types (scatter, bars, gauges, force graphs, metrics).

clusters.label: Scan State Engine
clusters.summary: Manages scan results, brain ROI activation state, and audience-specific interpretation of NAA metrics for visualization.

clusters.label: Brain Visualization
clusters.summary: Plotting module for cortical and subcortical brain regions using matplotlib, nilearn, and pyvista backends.

clusters.label: Inference API Core
clusters.summary: FastAPI inference server infrastructure with API key authentication, rate limiting, and TRIBE v2 model lifecycle management.

clusters.label: Authenticated Scans
clusters.summary: Scan operations enforced with user ownership verification and rate limiting across mutations.

clusters.label: Authentication Middleware
clusters.summary: Clerk middleware protecting scanner, report, and batch routes with authentication.

clusters.label: Next.js TypeScript Config
clusters.summary: Auto-generated type definitions for Next.js image and environment APIs.

clusters.label: Next.js Frontend Config
clusters.summary: Web application configuration with production optimizations and security headers for Docker deployment.

clusters.label: CSS Styling Config
clusters.summary: PostCSS configuration that processes Tailwind CSS for the web application.

clusters.label: Tailwind Config
clusters.summary: Configures Tailwind CSS content paths and theme variables for the Next.js web app.

clusters.label: Convex User Schema
clusters.summary: Defines the database schema for user accounts with tier-based credit management and Clerk authentication integration.

clusters.label: User Credits Query
clusters.summary: Convex query that retrieves remaining and maximum credits for a user by Clerk ID, defaulting to zero if user not found.

clusters.label: Root Layout & Providers
clusters.summary: Next.js app shell setting up Clerk auth, Convex backend, scan provider, and global styles with header component.

clusters.label: Landing Page Hero
clusters.summary: Next.js client component rendering home page with Phosphor icon imports for feature showcase.

clusters.label: Batch UI Layout
clusters.summary: Layout wrapper for batch operations using split-panel view structure.

clusters.label: Batch Audit Page
clusters.summary: Standalone /batch route rendering batch audit panel with item selection and detailed report view.

clusters.label: Report Layout
clusters.summary: Next.js layout wrapper that applies split-pane structure to report views.

clusters.label: Report Dashboard
clusters.summary: Main report page composing multiple audit and financial visualization charts.

clusters.label: Audit Comparison Layout
clusters.summary: Layout wrapper for split-view scanner interface with side-by-side comparison capabilities.

clusters.label: Scanner Dashboard
clusters.summary: Multi-tab interface for content auditing with batch processing, comparison, and multimodal analysis modes.

clusters.label: Clerk Auth SignIn
clusters.summary: Sign-in page component using Clerk authentication with email input and session management.

clusters.label: Clerk Sign-Up Page
clusters.summary: Client-side sign-up page using Clerk authentication with email state management and Next.js routing.

clusters.label: Audit Report Display
clusters.summary: Client component rendering audit narratives with summary, findings, and caveats sections.

clusters.label: Math Equation Renderer
clusters.summary: React component for rendering LaTeX equations using KaTeX with inline/block display modes.

clusters.label: Header Navigation
clusters.summary: Client-side header component with Clerk authentication UI that conditionally renders sign-in or user profile button.

clusters.label: Icon Components
clusters.summary: Reusable SVG icon components with configurable size and styling for web UI.

clusters.label: Brain Split Layout
clusters.summary: Layout component splitting brain visualization panel from scan result controls, supporting comparison mode.

clusters.label: Tab Navigation
clusters.summary: React tab navigation component with TypeScript interfaces for managing tab state and onChange callbacks.

clusters.label: Brain Depth Shading
clusters.summary: Computes per-face grey palette from sulcal depth to render 3D brain surface with uniform polygonal shading.

clusters.label: Guide Toggle Button
clusters.summary: Reusable button component for toggling guide visibility in the BrainViewer interface.

clusters.label: NAA Classification Explainer
clusters.summary: Explainer component that displays NAA classification levels (LOW/MOD/HIGH) with associated affinity and deletion metrics.

clusters.label: Report Summary Display
clusters.summary: Renders executive summary paragraph from scan results on report page.

clusters.label: Scientific Disclaimers
clusters.summary: Footer component displaying methodology disclaimers for neuroscience result views.

clusters.label: Demographic Selector
clusters.summary: UI component for selecting demographic categories in scanner with dropdown interaction.

clusters.label: Scan Result Display
clusters.summary: React component props for rendering scan results with audience-specific takeaways and loading state.

clusters.label: Batch Scanning
clusters.summary: Component for uploading and visualizing batch text analysis results in a scatter chart.

clusters.label: Scan Comparison UI
clusters.summary: Tab component for displaying and comparing scan results with demographic charts and element cards.

clusters.label: Multimodal Analysis UI
clusters.summary: React component for visualizing multimodal brain activation data with ROI processing and synthetic scan support.

clusters.label: Scanner Dashboard UI
clusters.summary: Tabbed scanning interface with scientific charts, gauges, and analysis visualizations.

clusters.label: Brain Hemisphere Coordinates
clusters.summary: Utilities for loading fsaverage5 pial surface vertex positions and generating spatially coherent brain activation data.

clusters.label: Convex Provider
clusters.summary: Client provider setup combining Convex backend client with Clerk authentication, guards against missing deployment URL.

clusters.label: Multimodal Encoder Integration
clusters.summary: Interprets per-modality neural activity from TRIBE v2 encoders (text/audio/video) mapped to cortical networks.

clusters.label: NAA Classification Format
clusters.summary: Defines classification types (LOW/MOD/HIGH) and human-readable labels (Neutral/Mixed/Reactive) for assessment scoring shared between scanner and reports.

clusters.label: Data Normalization
clusters.summary: Percentile-based robust normalization utility for rescaling visualization data to [0,1] range.

clusters.label: Brain Region Labels
clusters.summary: Manages metadata and descriptions for 17 brain regions in the Show Guide overlay, organized by neural system types (affective, deliberative, sensory, social).

clusters.label: Input Sanitization
clusters.summary: Utilities for stripping HTML and preventing XSS attacks in user-provided scan text.

clusters.label: Platform Detection
clusters.summary: Identifies media platforms (YouTube, TikTok, Instagram, Spotify, etc.) from URLs for client-side categorization.

clusters.label: Inference Security
clusters.summary: Security middleware for the inference server request pipeline.

clusters.label: Request/Response Models
clusters.summary: Pydantic models and enums defining schema for inference service API requests and responses.

clusters.label: Report Chart Rendering
clusters.summary: Matplotlib chart renderers that generate PNG bytes for PDF report embedding with unified monochrome-plus-fire styling.

clusters.label: Resumable Batch Inference
clusters.summary: Checkpoints batch inference progress using memory-mapped arrays and JSON tracking to resume from failures without reprocessing completed items.

clusters.label: Multimodal Preprocessing
clusters.summary: Thin wrapper layer enforcing limits and extracting formats (language, timestamps, frames) from text, audio, and video inputs for TRIBE v2 processing pipeline.

clusters.label: Inference Utilities
clusters.summary: Lower-level helpers for preprocessing, file handling, and batch checkpointing in the inference service.

clusters.label: ROI Index Caching
clusters.summary: Pre-computes HCP MMP1.0 ROI vertex-index cache to enable fast API server lookups without tribev2 import overhead.

clusters.label: Ising Alpha Calibration
clusters.summary: Estimates opinion-dynamics coupling parameter from neural arousal asymmetry via empirical regression.

clusters.label: ROI Vertex Export
clusters.summary: Exports HCP brain region-of-interest vertex indices from fsaverage5 mesh to backend cache and frontend visualization.

clusters.label: Brain Surface Masking
clusters.summary: Generates and geometrically validates medial-wall masks for fsaverage5 brain surfaces from FreeSurfer data.

clusters.label: Brain Surface Upsampling
clusters.summary: Creates lookup maps for expanding low-resolution brain surface data onto high-resolution meshes using nearest-neighbor geometry.

clusters.label: Model Weight Prewarming
clusters.summary: Script pre-downloads ML model weights (gTTS, WhisperX, LLaMA, Wav2Vec-BERT) to mounted cache before inference serving to eliminate request-time download latency.

clusters.label: Inference Deployment Validation
clusters.summary: Smoke test that verifies deployment environment health for TRIBE v2 inference by checking Python/GPU/model dependencies and running a single prediction round-trip.

clusters.label: Inference Test Fixtures
clusters.summary: Pytest configuration providing shared test fixtures for inference tests, including ROI cache mocking to avoid tribev2 dependency.

clusters.label: FastAPI Boot Tests
clusters.summary: Smoke test verifying app startup and health endpoint work with model loading disabled.

clusters.label: Auth Middleware Tests
clusters.summary: Tests for APIKeyMiddleware authenticating requests via API keys in the inference service.

clusters.label: Blob Storage & Serialization
clusters.summary: Tests in-memory blob storage and numpy array serialization/deserialization for inference services.

clusters.label: Inference Service Tests
clusters.summary: Unit tests for TribeInferenceService covering structural paths; GPU model load/predict tested via deployment smoke test.

clusters.label: Landau Magnetic Analysis
clusters.summary: Test suite for Landau theory phase-transition calculations—equilibrium magnetization, susceptibility curves, physics math independent of external services.

clusters.label: NAA Inference Testing
clusters.summary: Unit tests for neural analysis computation using cached ROI data fixtures.

clusters.label: Inference Pooling Tests
clusters.summary: Unit tests for aggregation functions (mean, peak, trimmed-mean pooling) on prediction tensors in the inference service.

clusters.label: Rate Limit Middleware
clusters.summary: Token-bucket rate limiting middleware tests for FastAPI services with configurable refill rates and proxy trust.

clusters.label: Report Testing
clusters.summary: Offline unit and integration tests for the audit-report API endpoint, context builder, and message rendering pipeline.

clusters.label: ROI Inference Tests
clusters.summary: Tests disk-cache fallback path for ROI service inference, with integration tests for live tribev2 lookup skipped if dependencies unavailable.

clusters.label: Timeseries Playback Tests
clusters.summary: Tests timeseries endpoint playback by injecting frames directly without model dependency.

clusters.label: Inference Tests
clusters.summary: Test suite package initialization for inference service.

clusters.label: Brain Mesh Export
clusters.summary: Converts fsaverage5 brain surfaces to Three.js-compatible formats (JSON, BIN, GLB) for neuroimaging visualization.

clusters.label: TRIBE v2 Demo Utils
clusters.summary: Utilities for TribeModel inference demonstrations and event DataFrame construction.

clusters.label: TRIBE Model Export
clusters.summary: Exposes TribeModel from tribev2 inference service as package entry point.

clusters.label: TRIBE Experiment Grids
clusters.summary: Grid configurations and defaults for TRIBE v2 neuroscience experiments.
